elements.name: Description
texts:
Portcreevy is in the Electoral Division of Pettigoe, in Civil Parish of Templecarn, in the Barony of Tirhugh, in the County of Donegal

Portcreevy is on Logainm.ie: Portcreevy.

Portcreevy has an area of:

    1,344,412 m² / 134.44 hectares / 1.3444 km²
    0.52 square miles
    332.21 acres / 332 acres, 0 roods, 33 perches

Nationwide, it is the 20732nd largest townland that we know about

Within Co. Donegal, it is the 1150th largest townland
